\doxysubsubsection{\texorpdfstring{computeOrientedMeasure()}{computeOrientedMeasure()}}
{\footnotesize\ttfamily template$<$Integer Dimension, typename Coordinates\+Variable $>$ \\
\mbox{\hyperlink{structReal3}{Real3}} Euclidian\+Geometry\+T\+::compute\+Oriented\+Measure (\begin{DoxyParamCaption}\item[{const Item\+With\+Nodes \&}]{item }\end{DoxyParamCaption})\hspace{0.3cm}{\ttfamily [virtual]}}



Calcul de la mesure orient{\ucr}e. 

Dans le cas d\textquotesingle{}un {\ucr}l{\ucr}ment plan, ceci correspond {\ucr} la normale moyenne unitaire $\ast$ mesure de l\textquotesingle{}{\ucr}l{\ucr}ment et dans le cas d\textquotesingle{}un simple {\ucr}l{\ucr}ment volumique nous obtenons volume $\ast$ z (ou z=(0,0,1))
